entity.description: Listerine is the No.1 Mouthwash Worldwide as it is the most advanced and complete mouthwash in the range. Johnson & Johnson calculation based in part on data reported by Nielsen through its Retail Measurement Service for the Mouthwash category for MATs ending July 2015 and July 2016, for the 37 markets globally. Copyright 2014, The Nielsen Company

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
Clinically proven to clean and protect with 6 benefits for total oral health:
• Strengthens teeth and helps prevent cavities
• Helps maintain healthy gums
• Helps reduce plaque formation
• Helps keep teeth naturally white by preventing tartar build up
• Kills 99.9% of germs that brushing misses to help prevent bad breath, plaque and gum problems
• Provides fresh breath

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
• To Use:
1. Rinse with 200ml (approximately half capful) undiluted Listerine each time, twice a day
2. Expel after rinsing for 30 seconds and do not swallow
3. No further rinse with water is required
• Caution:
1. Do not use in children under 6 years of age
2. In the unlikely event of adverse reaction or accidental swallowing of mouthwash, stop use and seek medical advice

displayMetadata.name: INGREDIENTS
displayMetadata.value: Water, Sorbitol, Propylene Glycol, Poloxamer 407, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Eucalyptol, Zinc Chloride, Benzoic Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Thymol, Methyl Salicylate, Sodium Saccharin, Flavor, Sodium Fluoride, Menthol, Aroma, Sucralose, CI 16035, CI 42090

metaData.Ingredients: Water, Sorbitol Propylene Glycol, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Poloxamer 407, Benzoic Acid, Eucalyptol, Flavor, Sodium Benzoate, Methyl Salicylate, Thymol, Menthol, Sodium Saccharin, Dipotassium Glycyrrhizate, Caramel, Sucralose
metaData.Key Information:
• Clinically proven reduction in gum problems
• Takes cares of the multiple signs of gum problems
• Non-alcohol formula with less intense taste
• Helps reduce plaque to keep gums healthy
• Unique formula with 4 essential oils deeply penetrates to kill bacteria in the plaque biofilm
metaData.Preparation:
Directions:
• For Children (6 to 12 years):
Use 10ml full strength, rinse the teeth and gum for 30 seconds twice daily
• For Adults and Children 12 Years and Above:
Use 20ml full strength, rinse the teeth and gums for 30 seconds
• Precaution:
1. Do not swallow
2. Supervise children over 6 years of age
3. If swallowed, get medical help right away
4. In the event f an adverse reaction, stop use and seek medical attention right away
5. Do not use if are allergic to any of the ingredients

metaData.Key Information:
• Fluoride Mouthwash, Mild Taste - Zero alcohol with fluoride for 7X^ cavity protection.
• Used twice daily, Listerine Total Care Cavity Protect Mouthwash helps prevent cavity problems with fluoride and target multiple oral benefits:
1) Whole mouth clean
2) Reaches between teeth
3) Kills 99.9% * of germs
4) Helps prevent cavities
5) Strengthens Teeth
6) Triple action acid protection

* germs that cause bad breath, plaque and gum problems
^ Compared to toothpaste alone. Twice a day for 20 days based on in lab studies
metaData.Preparation: DIRECTION: Use 20mL full strength, rinse the teeth and gums for 30 seconds twice daily as part of usual oral hygiene. Do not swallow.
